response.overview: Pulau Ubin an island lost to time, inhabited by its old residents. A van driver, Mr Ong, looks back on his home and finds out where his family stands alongside a country that’s continuously changing, Singapore. This short documentary film captures the reflections of a man navigating the intersection of memory and change, exploring themes of identity, family, and the passage of time on the evolving island of Pulau Ubin.
response.title: Past Fragments
